title: Fermented Polish Casabe Grill
description: A monsoon-inspired, ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly dish featuring fermented casabe and score-fat, grilled to perfection.
instructions: Combine casabe, score-fat, and ayurvedic ghee in a large bowl. Blend well to form a sticky dough.
Let the dough sit at room temperature for 3 days to ferment.
After fermentation, divide the dough into 4 equal pieces.
Shape each piece into a ball and flatten slightly into a disk shape.
Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium-high heat.
Grill the casabe disks for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until crispy and golden brown.
Season with black pepper and sea salt to taste.
Garnish with fresh parsley, dill, and ginger before serving.
Serve immediately, hot and fresh from the grill.
